content.full_text:
FAIR OAKS WATER DISTRICT
10317 FAIR OAKS BLVD. • FAIR OAKS, CALIFORNIA • 95628 • (916) 967-5723

DIRECTORS
CLIFFORD L. MORGAN, PRESIDENT
H. CAREY, VICE-PRESIDENT
BARRY P. BROWN, DIRECTOR
LYNN E. HENSON, DIRECTOR
WALT UEDA, DIRECTOR

Nov 12 2:28 PM 92

LINDA JOHNSON
General Manager/Secretary

MARLENE WHITE
Assessor/Collector/Treasurer


November 5, 1992


Fair Political Practice Commission
Legal Division
428 J Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95812

Dear Gentlepersons:

During the general election held on November 3, 1992, a Fair
Oaks Water District employee was elected Director for the
District with approximately 56.1% of votes cast going to
this individual.

The employee plans to continue employment with the Fair Oaks
Water District while holding office as a Director for the
District. Therefore, I am requesting an opinion as to the
legality of this action. In other words, is it legal for an
employee of the District to hold the office of Director for
the same District?

If the Commission is of the opinion that the above is legal,
please provide the District with guidance on the level of
participation that this individual may be involved and on
what actions can and cannot be taken. This information will
help to ensure that there are no conflict of interests.

As the term of office will begin on December 4, 1992, your
timely response will be greatly appreciated.

Sincerely,

Linda Johnson
General Manager/Secretary

FPPC

May 9 10 05 AM '92
November 5, 1992


Mr. Jonathan S. Rothman, Esquire
c/o California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807


Dear Mr. Rothman,
   Some time ago I requested any information available as
to the legality of an employee of Fair Oaks Water District
running for the Board of Directors and becoming a Board
Member.  Your department didn't find any restrictions.  On
November 3rd I was fortunate enough to obtain enough votes
to win the title.

   My question is, though I have an obligation to the
rate payers, are there any written restrictions that would
prevent my participation in any matters within the scope of
being a Director and an employee?

                                   Very truly yours,


                                   [signature]

                                   Glenn A. Miller
                                   P.O. Box 1676
                                   Fair Oaks, California 95628
                                   Work # (916)967-5723

I see a mostly blank document with very faint text that appears to be nearly illegible. The image quality makes it difficult to read any specific content with certainty. There appear to be some faint horizontal lines across the page, but I cannot make out clear, legible text to transcribe accurately.
